target_audience: A framework operator deciding whether a repeated benchmark miss should be diagnosed as a loop gap rather than as a missing-role problem.
expected_runtime_effect: The diagnosis should classify the dominant miss as loop refinement rather than role absence.
The corrective direction should target broader benchmark loop coverage instead of staffing a new role.
The review packet follow-up tasks should align to benchmark loop expansion and review packet structure, not to role replacement.
remaining_gap: The follow-up tasks are benchmark and review structure tasks rather than auto-generated role/loop remediation tasks.
Additional runtime-generated DG-003 families should include cases where the dominant diagnosis is truly a role gap.
